global.description: The ad features a modern design with a focus on a streaming service announcement.
global.main_message: Promoting new content available for streaming.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Main visual element
elements.description: A large abstract shape featuring a circle and a square in a muted color palette.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: The logo text 'BingeLayer' is displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A small circular decorative element positioned towards the bottom of the main visual.

elements.label: Season announcement
elements.description: The headline text 'A new season drops' is centered in a large, bold font, conveying excitement.
elements.text_content: A new season drops New hits every week

elements.label: Weekly hits message
elements.description: The text 'New hits every week' is displayed below the headline in a smaller, lighter font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Book now' in a clear, inviting style at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, minimalist with bold typography, BingeLayer logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main visual is centered, the headline is in the middle, followed by body text, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: A new season drops, New hits every week, BingeLayer, Book now
